since_last: 33% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.59%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.42% · BTC -1.48% · Gold -0.94% · Nasdaq100 +0.33%. 33% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.59%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.59%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at -4.86%
cards.body: Leaders: TTD +2.51%, DV +1.88%, LSCC +1.68%, NOW +1.49%, LEU +1.37%. Laggards: AMAT -4.86%, MU -4.63%, KLAC -4.11%, LRCX -4.09%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.14% at $143.65
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.14% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
